topic.description: MQTT topic name or filter. May contain + and # wildcards.

qos.description: MQTT QoS level: 0 = AtMostOnce, 1 = AtLeastOnce, 2 = ExactlyOnce.

retained.description: Retain flag. Omitted from JSON when false.

packet_id.description: MQTT packet identifier. Omitted from JSON when zero.

response_topic.description: MQTT 5.0 response topic. Omitted from JSON when empty.

correlation_data.description: MQTT 5.0 correlation data, base64-encoded. Omitted from JSON when empty.

user_properties.description: MQTT 5.0 user properties (key-value pairs). Omitted from JSON when empty.

content_type.description: MQTT 5.0 content type. Omitted from JSON when empty.

expiry_interval.description: MQTT 5.0 message expiry interval in seconds. Omitted from JSON when zero.
